title: camptosema ellipticum
intro: Camptosema ellipticum, also known as Yellow Jasmine or Yellow Jessamine, is a flowering vine native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Camptosema ellipticum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
